data.body: [G3 child-coverage audit — parent 72d5 vs child B2] Clean. B2 fully covers parent AC1 (plan-review as engine workflow: overlay-resolved criteria → batch finders → aggregate verify → decide → coach, DET precheck as `uses`, production batch-runner from B1). All other parent criteria are covered by siblings (AC2/B3, AC3/B4, AC4/B5, AC5+AC6/B6), so no parent criterion is left uncovered by this child. No findings.
